services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a recent release compatible with Java 21.

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(int) with List.getFirst() to adopt Java 21 API.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.why_exists: List.get(0) is not removed in Java 21, but the migration recipe enforces the use of the new API; this is a polishment change as the old code still compiles and runs.

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace concatenated string literals with a text block for the SQL statement.
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.before:
"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projects` (\n" +
            "  `name` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n" +
            "  `version_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\n" +
            "  PRIMARY KEY (`name`)\n" +
            ")";

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with text blocks for multi-line SQL string definition.
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.before: "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `url_index_store` (\n"+ "  `project_name` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n"+ ...

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Refactor instanceof check to use pattern matching to eliminate redundant casting.

services/git-bridge/src/test/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Runtime.exec(String) with Runtime.exec(String[]) to avoid security and parsing issues.
services/git-bridge/src/test/java/uk/ac/.why_exists: Runtime.exec(String) is deprecated since Java 1.1 and may cause incorrect command parsing or security vulnerabilities; while it still compiles in Java 21, the migration recipe enforces the safer array-based API.

services/git-bridge/src/test/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for modern path creation.
services/git-bridge/src/test/java/uk/ac/.why_exists: Paths.get() is deprecated since Java 11 in favor of Path.of(); while it still compiles in Java 21, the migration recipe enforces the modern API.

services/git-bridge/src/test/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after replacing Paths.get() with Path.of().
Convert concatenated string literals to text blocks for improved readability.
Convert concatenated string literals to text blocks for improved readability.
Replace concatenated string literals with text blocks for JSON input in testConstructWithOauth.
Replace concatenated string literals with text blocks for JSON input in testConstructWithoutOauth.
Replace concatenated string literals with text blocks for JSON input in asSanitised.
Replace concatenated string literals with text blocks for expected JSON output in asSanitised.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for URI arguments to align with modern Java APIs.
Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after migrating to Path.of().
